languages.text: "Эффективность данного действия равняется нулю. Бунт на пустотном судне стал причиной смятения и угнетения {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинного духа{/g} имплантационного трона. Если священная технология взбунтуется во время операции, это может повредить вашим аугментам. На данный момент имплантационный трон функционирует лишь как место осмотра".

traits.locale_text: "Эффективность данного действия приравнена к нулю. Бунт на пустотном судне стал причиной смятения и угнетения {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинного духа{/g} имплантационного трона. Если священная технология взбунтуется во время операции, это может повредить вашим аугментам. На данный момент имплантационный трон функционирует лишь как место осмотра".

languages.text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null. The mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."
languages.original_text: "Эффективность данного действия равняется нулю. Бунт на пустотном судне стал причиной смятения и угнетения {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинного духа{/g} имплантационного трона. Если священная технология взбунтуется во время операции, это может повредить вашим аугментам. На данный момент имплантационный трон функционирует лишь как место осмотра".

Mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only as an inspection area."

"Request registered and denied. Mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the machine spirit of the implantation chair. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. The machine spirit requires rest."

If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."

languages.text: 「登録と拒否が完了した。虚舟の乗組員による反乱が、インプラント・チェアの機械霊に混乱と不快感をもたらした。聖なる技術が手術中に反乱を起こせば、あなたの拡張機能に損傷を与える可能性がある。機械霊は休息を必要とする」
languages.original_text: "Request registered and denied. Mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the machine spirit of the implantation chair. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. The machine spirit requires rest."

traits.locale_text: 「登録と拒否が完了しました。虚舟の乗組員による反乱が、インプラント・チェアの機械霊に混乱と不快感をもたらしました。聖なる技術が手術中に反乱を起こせば、あなたの拡張機能に損傷を与える可能性があります。機械霊は休息を必要とします。」

languages.text: "Bu eylemin etkinliği sıfır olacaktır. Uçsuz gemisindeki isyan, implantasyon koltuğunun {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuna{/g} kafa karışıklığı ve huzursuzluk ekti. Kutsal teknoloji operasyon sırasında isyan ederse ogmentlerinize zarar verebilir. Şu anda implantasyon tahtı yalnızca muayene işlevi görmektedir."
languages.original_text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null. The mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."

traits.locale_text: "Bu eylemin etkinliği sıfır olacaktır. Uçsuz gemisindeki isyan, implantasyon koltuğunun {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuna{/g} kafa karışıklığı ve huzursuzluk ekti. Kutsal teknoloji operasyon sırasında isyan ederse ogmentlerinize zarar verebilir. Şu anda implantasyon tahtı yalnızca muayene işlevi görmektedir."

languages.text: «La eficacia de esta acción sería nula. El motín a bordo de la nave del vacío ha sembrado confusión y malestar en el {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del trono de implantación. Si la tecnología sagrada se rebelara durante la operación, podría dañar sus aumentos. Ahora mismo, el trono solo puede ejecutar funciones de inspección».
languages.original_text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null. The mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."

traits.locale_text: «La eficacia de esta acción sería nula. El motín a bordo de la nave del vacío ha sembrado confusión y malestar en el {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del trono de implantación. Si la tecnología sagrada se rebelara durante la operación, podría dañar sus aumentos. Ahora mismo, el trono solo puede ejecutar funciones de inspección».

languages.text: “此项操作的效能等级为零。虚空舰上的叛乱已在移植王座的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}中散播了混乱与衰弱。如果在手术过程中这项神圣科技发生反抗，可能会损害您的植入物。目前，移植王座仅可执行检查功能。”
languages.original_text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null. The mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."

traits.locale_text: “此项操作的效能等级为零。虚空舰上的叛乱已在移植王座的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}中散播了混乱与衰弱。如果在手术过程中这项神圣科技发生反抗，可能会损害您的植入物。目前，移植王座仅可执行检查功能。”

languages.text: « Cette action serait inefficace. La mutinerie à bord du vaisseau a semé confusion et malaise chez l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} du fauteuil d'implantation. La technologie sacrée risquerait d'endommager vos augmentations si elle se révoltait au cours de l'opération. À l'heure actuelle, le fauteuil d'implantation fait uniquement office de dispositif d'inspection. »
languages.original_text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null. The mutiny on board the voidship has sown confusion and malaise in the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the implantation throne. If the sacred technology were to revolt during the operation, it could damage your augments. At present, the implantation throne functions only for inspections."

traits.locale_text: « Cette action serait inefficace. La mutinerie à bord du vaisseau a semé confusion et malaise chez l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} du fauteuil d'implantation. La technologie sacrée risquerait d'endommager vos augmentations si elle se révoltait au cours de l'opération. À l'heure actuelle, le fauteuil d'implantation fait uniquement office de dispositif d'inspection. »

languages.text: "Die Effizienz dieser Aktion läge bei null. Die Meuterei an Bord des Raumschiffs hat Verwirrung und Krankheit im {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} des Implantationsthrons hervorgerufen. Sollte die heilige Technologie während der Operation aufbegehren, könnten Eure Augmentationen beschädigt werden. Derzeit kann der Implantationsthron lediglich für Inspektionen genutzt werden."
languages.original_text: "The effectiveness of this action would be null.
